ModMetaData.name: Faction - Elves - Modernized
ModMetaData.author: Mxswat
ModMetaData.description:
Combat Extended compatibility and combat overhaul for Faction - Elves (ICC.FOV.ELVES).
Elves are reimagined as disciplined marksmen and skirmishers who have embraced modern firearms without abandoning their traditions. Each elven faction receives upgraded tech levels, industrial-era weapon loadouts, and CE loadout properties.
- High Elvish Kingdom: upgraded to Industrial - scouts with assault rifles, rangers with ARs/snipers, sharpshooters, and wardens with smoke support - Dark Elvish Kingdom: upgraded to Industrial - SMG scouts, shotgun reavers, shield-wielding marauders, and melee blademasters - Wild Elvish Tribe: tribal shields and arrow magazines (CE-only) - Celestia Elvish Empire: spacer-tier loadout support - Full CE integration with LoadoutPropertiesExtension, ammo preferences, shields, smoke grenades, and forced sidearms
